Name: Eat Your Vegetables I
Description: Attain rank 3 reputation (friendly) with the farmers of Gok Golma.

Description: Attain rank 4 reputation (trusted) with the farmers of Gok Golma.

Description: Attain rank 7 reputation (sworn) with the farmers of Gok Golma.

Description: Complete the quest “Dressed to Protect.”

Name: Observing the Occult
Description: Unlock all entries in the Occult Record pertaining to the South Horn.

Name: Critical Thinking I
Description: Complete 10 critical encounters on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Critical Thinking II
Description: Complete 50 critical encounters on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Critical Thinking III
Description: Complete 100 critical encounters on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Critical Thinking IV
Description: Complete 500 critical encounters on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Occult Erudition I
Description: Complete 10 FATEs on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Occult Erudition II
Description: Complete 50 FATEs on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Occult Erudition III
Description: Complete 100 FATEs on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Occult Erudition IV
Description: Complete 500 FATEs on the Occult Crescent.

Name: A Fork to Be Reckoned With I
Description: Complete the Forked Tower: Blood for the first time.

Name: A Fork to Be Reckoned With II
Description: Complete the Forked Tower: Blood 10 times.

Name: A Fork to Be Reckoned With III
Description: Complete the Forked Tower: Blood 50 times.

Name: A Fork to Be Reckoned With IV
Description: Complete the Forked Tower: Blood 100 times.

Name: Magic Is the Best Medicine I
Description: Resurrect another player on the Occult Crescent 10 times.

Name: Magic Is the Best Medicine II
Description: Resurrect another player on the Occult Crescent 100 times.

Name: Magic Is the Best Medicine III
Description: Resurrect another player on the Occult Crescent 500 times.

Name: Phantomastery I
Description: Master 1 phantom job.

Name: Phantomastery II
Description: Master 5 phantom jobs.

Name: Phantomastery III
Description: Master 10 phantom jobs.

Name: Horns of Plenty I
Description: Open 10 treasure coffers found during your excursions on the Occult Crescent.

Description: Open 100 treasure coffers found during your excursions on the Occult Crescent.

Description: Open 1,000 treasure coffers found during your excursions on the Occult Crescent.

Name: Horns of Plenty IV

Description: Open 200 treasure coffers revealed to you by persistent pots on the Occult Crescent.

Description: Discover every location on the Occult Crescent: South Horn.
